title: Scoreboards Backup
description: This is a mod to backup your scoreboard in the map.
body:
# Minecraft Scoreboard Backup Mod

## Introduction
This mod could backup your scoreboard into a json file.

## Commands
Use `/sbk help` for more details.

## Config
Location: `./config/sbk.properties`
Example:
```
scores=score1|score2|score3
```
